title: calvaria borbonica
intro: Calvaria borbonica is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Calvaria borbonica include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as its potential to lower fever and improve skin health. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
